examples: A few years ago, I asked the same question about hitching in a column of a newspaper.
Rural Ireland was recommended as a friendly place for hitching, as was Quebec, Canada—"if you don't mind being criticized for not speaking French".
We spent the summer hitching around Europe.
The Hitching Post 2 was made famous by its starring role in the wine country romantic comedy Sideways.
Hitching to the Internet has been perilous for some companies looking to diversify.
